text.title: Continuous Discovery Habits Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals to apply / skip / route-elsewhere. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: PM owns one product area AND has access to >=1 customer interview/week?

branch.question: existing OST present AND last interview <= 7 days ago?

conclusion.verdict: run weekly trio cycle (code -> synthesize -> trio decide)
full quarterly reset: prune + re-establish weekly cadence
catch up: re-establish cadence + verify quote provenance on recent additions

text.example: applies=true -> cadence_holds=true -> apply weekly trio cycle (rule weekly-cadence).
